name: Chevron Phillips Chemical
description: CPChem is a leading producer of polyethylene, which is a key polymer used in a variety of everyday products. Their commitment to operational excellence and stakeholder engagement underscores their focus on innovation and quality in the chemicals industry.

name: A. Schulman
description: LyondellBasell specializes in polyethylene (PE) technologies, highlighting their expertise and interest in advancing this material.

name: Everett J. Prescott Inc.
description: Everett J. Prescott is a distributor that specializes in water, wastewater, and stormwater solutions, and they offer a variety of products, including polyethylene tubing.

name: Intertape polymer group
description: IPG offers a variety of polyethylene tape solutions, including PE-SP, PE34, PE35, and more, highlighting their expertise in packaging and protective products. Their innovative approach also includes sustainable packaging alternatives.

name: Pexco
description: Pexco specializes in polyethylene extrusion manufacturing, producing both HDPE and LDPE parts for various market applications.

name: borouge
description: Borouge is a prominent manufacturer of polyolefin solutions, including performance polyethylene (PE) branded as Anteo, which highlights their innovative approach to creating sustainable plastics. With a significant production capacity and advanced technologies, Borouge caters to various industries, emphasizing their commitment to addressing global challenges.

name: ESENTTIA
description: Esenttia is a Colombian manufacturer that specializes in polyethylene, among other products, offering solutions essential for the plastic industry. Their LDPE TRICOLENE EF 601AA is a low-density copolymer of butene, ideal for film extrusion, and contains slip and antiblock additives.

name: TDI Custom Packaging Inc.
description: TDI Custom Packaging is a specialized manufacturer of polyethylene products, including custom plastic bags, film, and tubing, using premium FDA-approved resins. With decades of experience, they focus on smaller production runs and fast turnaround times, ensuring high-quality packaging solutions.

name: Entec Polymers
description: Entec Polymers specializes in providing a comprehensive selection of plastics, including Polyethylene, Linear Low Density, and Metallocene (mLLDPE), ensuring that they meet the specific material needs of their customers. With a focus on sustainable technology and personalized support, Entec guides clients through the entire project process, from concept to production.

name: Entec Resins México
description: Entec Polymers is a leading distributor of engineering thermoplastics and basic products for the North American automotive market, highlighting their expertise in polyethylene copolymers.
